arts.ttl: Video: Watch Bradley Barcola Go Five-Hole on Brice Samba in PSG-Stade Rennais
arts.sum: After a scoreless 25 minutes, Paris Saint-Germain broke the scoreless deadlock with Stade Rennais to take a 1-0 advantage over the home side on Saturday at Roazhon Park. On a quick attack in the 27th minute, Bradley Barcola was launched deep, clearly on the edge of being offside. He cut inside, positioned himself in front […] The post Video: Watch Bradley Barcola Go Five-Hole on Brice Samba in PSG-Stade Rennais appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi didn't speak to PSG team-mate for THREE MONTHS for badmouthing Barcelona
arts.sum: Lionel Messi ’s spell with PSG was marked by controversy and now it has been revealed that the superstar did not speak to one of his team-mates for three months after he badmouthed Barcelona . Now Leandro Paredes has admitted that his Argentina colleague went an extended time without speaking to him after he spoke badly of the Camp Nou side prior to Messi arriving in France.

arts.ttl: Barcelona, Ajax, and PSG Face Backlash in Kit Revenue
arts.sum: UEFA published its The European Club Finance and Investment Landscape report this week.

arts.ttl: PSG star Khvicha Kvaratskhelia sends clear message to Liverpool with bold prediction
arts.sum: PSG are looking to seal their place in the Champions League quarter-finals after losing 1-0 to Liverpool in the last-16 first leg, despite dominating much of the tie against Arne Slot's side

arts.ttl: PSG players 'shocked by how POOR Liverpool were' despite 1-0 loss - with French champions 'convinced two other Champions League clubs are more complete than Arne Slot's side'
arts.sum: PSG players were reportedly left shocked by the poor level of Liverpool 's performance in the first leg of their Champions League round of 16 tie on Wednesday night.
